# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
    vmNamePrefix: 'myVM' # prefix to use when creating resources names, e.g., "prod" or "dev". Default is empty string which means no suffix will be added automatically 
                          (e.g., myvm-prod for production VMs and not used in dev)  
    locationName: yourLocationHere # the Azure region to deploy into - default value should match with resource group, e.g.: eastus2 or westcentralus etc...    
    adminUsername: 'admin'  // The administrator username of virtual machine (VM). Default is empty string which means no suffix will be added automatically  
                          (e.g., myvm-prod for production VMs and not used in dev)     
    sourceImageName: '' # the name or ID of a marketplace image to use as an OS disk, e.g.: 'UbuntuLTS' 
                        // if left empty then it will default Ubuntu Server version (18.04 LTS).  
                        
resources:    
- type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines    # resource provider and type for managing VMs     
  name: ${concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-', uniqstring(resourceGroup().id))}       // unique ID of the deployed resources, e.g., myVMprod-9874563210  
  apiVersion: '2019-12-01'     # API version for managing VMs     
  location: ${parameters('locationName')}       // The Azure region to deploy into - default value should match with resource group, e.g.: eastus or westcentralus etc...  
  properties:    &vmProperties        // Properties of the virtual machine (VM)    
                  osProfile:          # OS profile for our VMs     
                    computerName: ${parameters('adminUsername')}       // The name to assign to this node, e.g., mynode1  
                      adminUsername:  ${parameters('adminUsername')}        // Admin username    
                  storageProfile:          # Storage profile for our VMs     
                    imageReference:         &imageRef    // Reference the marketplace image used      
                                              - publisherName: 'canonical' 
                                                offer: 'UbuntuServer'  
                                                sku: '18.04-LTS'       
                                                version: latest          # The version of OS should be set to "latest" for automatic updates    
                    osDisk:         // Operating system disk details     
                      name: ${parameters('vmNamePrefix')}       // Name will be the same as VM prefix  
                        caching: ReadWrite        // Caching options   
                          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS          # Storage account type for OS and data disks    
                    dataDisks:         // Data disk details     
                      - name: ${parameters('vmNamePrefix')}       // Name will be the same as VM prefix  
                        caching: ReadWrite        // Caching options   
                          storageAccountType: Standard_LRS          # Storage account type for OS and data disks
